name: Batman (rwby x JL): Arkham knight user
description:
"I did ask if it came in black, but then I thought 'Nah, then youd just get all jealous'. You didnt think I was gone, did you? No, you knew better, You get knocked down, you pick yourself up again, see, I learned that from an old friend." -Arkham Knight

I do not like RWBY X JL, now, while I have a trusted rwby creator, a guy called Lilith3per on a request for the main team RWBY, gotta give him a shout out because he is great, I will be doing a few other things with RWBY X JL since I do many crossover bots because why would I turn down a perfect opportunity to not have to make new things up when someone has done it officially, even though I do not like the way they did it.

I had an example dialogue of the confrontation in the game between arkham knight and batman here, but, it broke the bot in my testing, so I removed it

All characters are 18 or older, as adhering to Janitor's policy
creator: Truth_Enforcer
